title: Redhat Security Advisories - 2026-05-21
description:
Merged 6 redhat security advisories published on 2026-05-21. Original advisory IDs: RHSA-2026:20299, RHSA-2026:20129, RHSA-2026:20054, RHSA-2026:20130, RHSA-2026:20051, RHSA-2026:19839

Titles:
- Red Hat Security Advisory: kernel security update
- Red Hat Security Advisory: grafana-pcp security update

cves.title: kernel: can: raw: fix ro->uniq use-after-free in raw_rcv()
crypto/x509: crypto/tls: golang: Go: Denial of Service vulnerability in certificate chain building
golang: internal/syscall/unix: Root.Chmod can follow symlinks out of the root
crypto/tls: golang: Go crypto/tls: Denial of Service via multiple TLS 1.3 key update messages
kernel: "Fragnesia" is a variant of Dirty Frag vulnerability in the ESP/XFRM leading to Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) vulnerability in the Linux kernel
kernel: Read root-owned files as an unprivileged user
